EmailTemplate.name: uDC Account Rejected
EmailTemplate.subject: Account Information Needed
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Account Information Needed
Dear {!Account.Account_POC_Firstname__c},
Our team was not able to verify some of the information you entered for access to the uDesign® digital platform. Please contact our Customer Success department for more information or to provide needed account details for activation.
866-900-8522 support@ulabsystems.com
Sincerely, Your uLab Team
We're here to help. Call +1 (866)-900-8522 or Email support@ulabsystems.com
Privacy Policy | Terms of Use | ulabsystems.com
